calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: INV-074 crystallization necessity test -- post-Phase-3-enrichment retest (supersedes V3-EXQ-610b)
items.note: Retest of INV-074 crystallization-necessity claim following IGW-20260601-023 substrate implementation (test_bed_enrichment_crystallization_necessity). V3-EXQ-610b (2026-06-01) FAILed with D2=false: the no-crystallization control arm did NOT show predicted post-Phase-3 diversity collapse (d2_delta -0.0057). Per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-610a_2026-06-01, the cause was test-bed ceiling: CausalGridWorldV2 supplied no post-Phase-3 destabilising pressure to force continued forward-model adaptation. IGW-20260601-023 implemented the substrate fix: infant_curriculum.InfantCurriculumScheduler Phase 3 now enables SD-047 multi_source_dynamics (weather_field + transient_events + background_drift with n_drift_sources=2), SD-048 interoceptive_noise (autonomic + sensitisation + fatigue at scale=0.6), and accelerated env_drift (interval=3, prob=0.5). These dynamics should force F-reconsolidation post-Phase-3. Prediction: ARM_0 (no crystallization) will now show entropy collapse (D2 delta >= +0.10); ARM_1 (MECH-333/334 crystallization) will preserve Phase-2 diversity. 2-arm design: ARM_0 control (crystallize=false) vs ARM_1 test (crystallize=true), both with MECH-313 noise_floor + MECH-260 dACC + MECH-341 E3 score diversity (retuned) + differential_heads (ARC-062 fix). 3 matched seeds (42/43/44), 4-phase infant curriculum (Phases 0-3), 2500 episodes @ 200 steps/ep. Pre-registered acceptance: D1 (ARM_1 - ARM_0 at end_phase_3 >= +0.10) AND D2 (ARM_0 phase_2 - phase_3 >= +0.10) AND D3 (both arms > 0.4 at phase_2). Interpretation grid in script docstring. Dry-run smoke test PASS 2026-06-01T18:48Z: end-to-end without crash, validate_experiments AST conformance OK, emit_outcome sentinel wired. claim_ids per Accuracy Rule: direct test of INV-074/MECH-333/MECH-334 only. experiment_purpose=evidence. Authored via IGW-20260601-028 (auto-spawned retest-after-substrate). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.title: Q-045/MECH-313/MECH-260 + FP-2 dissociation on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding (re-issue of 603d on hook-fixed scheduler + z_goal_enabled config)
items.note: Substrate-readiness validation (EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic) of the 2026-06-02 implement-substrate AMEND (scaffolded_sd054_onboarding update_z_goal wiring, ree-v3 deb24cc). THREE changes vs 603d: (1) restored P0/P1=100/50 budget; (2) from_dims sets z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0 (603d omitted it -> goal_state None -> update_z_goal early-returned); (3) bespoke P2 loop now calls update_z_goal each step. Acceptance: z_goal_norm_peak > 0.4 on >=2/3 seeds in P2 AND P1 survival gate passed on >=2/3 seeds. Forced-seed verification confirmed the 603e P2 path forms z_goal (peak 0.36 at 25 steps). claim_ids recorded as context (diagnostic; not governance-weighted).

items.title: ARC-068 / MECH-320 Niv-vs-Salamone opportunity-cost-vs-effort-cost dissociation
items.note: ARC-068 (action.opportunity_cost_no_op_penalty) Niv-vs-Salamone discriminative test on MECH-320 w_passive implementation. EXP-0081 / EVB-0237 dispatch_mode=discriminative_pair. ARC-068 lit-pull R3 verdict 2026-05-16 preserves slot-level registration; implementation collapses into MECH-320. R4 verdict: ARC-068 must NOT collapse into MECH-258 / SD-032b dacc_effort_cost (Salamone & Correa 2003 dissociation). 4-arm design: ARM_0 baseline / ARM_1 vigor + Niv env / ARM_2 vigor + Salamone elevated-movement-cost env / ARM_3 baseline + Salamone env. Forced-vigor probe v_t_floor=0.05 implements V3-EXQ-549 prescribed fix (substrate fired correctly under V3-EXQ-547 readiness but EWMA path stuck at zero under default env config in 549; 549 reclassified non_contributory and routed forced-vigor follow-on). Pre-registered acceptance C1 Niv lift >= 0.03, C2 dissociation < 0.50, C3 gate_product >= 0.5, C4 informative-only no-op penalty. claim_ids=[MECH-320, ARC-068] with evidence_direction_per_claim. MECH-258 / SD-032b are foils dissociated from, NOT tested directly. 4-row interpretation grid in script docstring: PASS = ARC-068 supports; C2 FAIL = ARC-068 weakens (effort-cost collapse, surface supersession question to /governance); C1 FAIL + C3 PASS = /failure-autopsy; C3 FAIL = /diagnose-errors. Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).

items.notes: MECH-229 retest on SD-049 Phase 3 substrate (use_sd049_per_axis_consumer_cascade=True). Supersedes V3-EXQ-514k which FAILed row1b_joint_identity_probe_weak on 2026-06-01. MECH-229 was demoted active -> provisional on 2026-06-01 with pending_retest_after_substrate=true. Prior PASSes (EXQ-074f, 234, 354) were on single-resource substrate (degenerate test). Phase 3 consumer cascade (incl MECH-295 axis-matched routing) landed 2026-05-31. Tests identity-distinct wanting on multi-resource substrate per pending_retest_after_substrate gate. 4-arm design: ARM_0 off / ARM_1 2-type / ARM_2 3-type / ARM_3 5-type. Pre-registered PASS: C0-C3b probe/classifier gates, C4 ARM_2 goal_resource_r >= 0.5, C5 ARM_2 - ARM_0 lift >= 0.4, C6 ARM_2 wanting!=liking trajectory fraction >= 0.6. Authored as IGW-20260602-029 auto-spawned retest-after-substrate task.
